The residence

Lucille

The crown of the collection — a top-floor two-bedroom residence of over 150 square metres gross with a private terrace of almost 35 square metres above the rooftops of Green Coast, Palasë. The terrace holds the long view over the resort towards the Ionian — made for evenings outdoors.

Explore the residence

Walk it, room by room

Tap any room on the plan to see its size.

Position within Green Coast

Where Lucille sits

Lucille sits on the quiet north-western edge of the village, a short walk above the central plaza — close enough for morning coffee on the square, set back enough for stillness. The parking entrance is below, the hotel and its services across the plaza, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.

Location & setting

Life at Green Coast

Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.
